channel.title: tool on 时长N年半
channel.description: Recent content in tool on 时长N年半

item.title: Graphviz Examples
item.description: usage 安装相应软件包 $ pacman -S graphviz xdot 新建 test.dot 文件，保存绘图代码。 使用 xdot 实时预览， $ xdot test.dot 绘图结果，生成 png 图片， $ dot -Tpng -o test.png test.dot graph undirected graph { label="Undirected Graph"; rankdir=LR; { rank=same; a, c, d }; splines=line; a -- b -- c -- e -- a; a -- c -- d; } directed digraph { a -> b; b -> c; c -> d; d -> a; } subgraph asynomous digraph G { main -> init -> make_string; main -> {parse, cleanup}; main -> printf; parse -> execute -> {make_string, compare, printf}; } named Subgraph name must start with prefix cluster.
